I need to add belt scan UI controls to LH_JA02's FrmMain.Designer.vb and FrmMain.vb, mirroring what was done in RH_JA02.

Read and modify these files:
1. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\LH_JA02\FrmMain.Designer.vb
2. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\LH_JA02\FrmMain.vb

### For FrmMain.Designer.vb:

A. Find the New declarations area (before SuspendLayout) and add:
```vb
Me.lblBeltHeader = New System.Windows.Forms.Label()
Me.srcBeltValue = New System.Windows.Forms.Label()
Me.srcBeltDec = New System.Windows.Forms.Label()
```

B. Find Panel5.Controls.Add section and add these 3 lines at the TOP:
```vb
Me.Panel5.Controls.Add(Me.srcBeltDec)
Me.Panel5.Controls.Add(Me.srcBeltValue)
Me.Panel5.Controls.Add(Me.lblBeltHeader)
```

C. Before Panel5.ResumeLayout, add the control initialization:
```vb
'
'lblBeltHeader
'
Me.lblBeltHeader.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.Black
Me.lblBeltHeader.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.lblBeltHeader.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 14.0!, System.Drawing.FontStyle.Bold)

Me.lblBeltHeader.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(6, 420)
Me.lblBeltHeader.Name = "lblBeltHeader"
Me.lblBeltHeader.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(343, 31)
Me.lblBeltHeader.TabIndex = 230
Me.lblBeltHeader.Text = "RETRACTOR SCAN"
Me.lblBeltHeader.TextAlign = System.Drawing.ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
'
'srcBeltValue
'
Me.srcBeltValue.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(CType(CType(255, Byte), Integer), CType(CType(255, Byte), Integer), CType(CType(192, Byte), Integer))

Me.srcBeltValue.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(343, 50)
Me.srcBeltValue.TabIndex = 231
Me.srcBeltValue.TextAlign = System.Drawing.ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
'
'srcBeltDec
'
Me.srcBeltDec.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.White
Me.srcBeltDec.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.srcBeltDec.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 36.0!, System.Drawing.FontStyle.Bold)
Me.srcBeltDec.ForeColor = System.Drawing.Color.White
Me.srcBeltDec.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(6, 501)
Me.srcBeltDec.Name = "srcBeltDec"
Me.srcBeltDec.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(343, 70)
Me.srcBeltDec.TabIndex = 232
Me.srcBeltDec.TextAlign = System.Drawing.ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
```

D. At the end of the class (before End Class), add declarations:
```vb
Friend WithEvents lblBeltHeader As System.Windows.Forms.Label
Friend WithEvents srcBeltValue As System.Windows.Forms.Label
Friend WithEvents srcBeltDec As System.Windows.Forms.Label
```

### For FrmMain.vb:

A. In InitControl(), before "End Sub", add:
```vb
' Belt scan controls reset
srcBeltValue.Text = ""
srcBeltDec.Text = ""
srcBeltDec.BackColor = Color.White
```

B. In the wStep = 3 belt verification block, update to show UI:
- When OptionBeltCode = "": set srcBeltValue.Text = "NA", srcBeltDec.Text = "NA", srcBeltDec.BackColor = Color.Green, srcBeltDec.ForeColor = Color.White
- When OptionBeltCode has value: set lblBeltHeader.Text = "RETRACTOR [" & OptionBeltCode & "]"

C. In Serial_Scanner_DataReceived where belt scan happens (wStep = 3.1):
- Add srcBeltValue.Text = ScanData before the if check
- On success: srcBeltDec.Text = "OK", srcBeltDec.BackColor = Color.Blue, srcBeltDec.ForeColor = Color.White
- On failure: srcBeltDec.Text = "NG", srcBeltDec.BackColor = Color.Red, srcBeltDec.ForeColor = Color.White

IMPORTANT: Read the files first to find exact insertion points. The structure should be very similar to RH_JA02 but may have slightly different line numbers.

   559→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   560→
   561→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   562→        Dim i As Integer
   563→
   564→        retVal = ""

   569→                i = i + 1

   572→                i = i + 3
   573→            End If
